title: lspNavigatorInput
description: Input for LSP navigation operations. All operations require an absolute filePath, 1-based line, and 1-based character.

operation.description: LSP operation to invoke. One of 9 supported operations.

filePath.description: Absolute path to the target file. Relative paths are rejected (Iron Law 1).

line.description: 1-based line number. LSP protocol is 1-based; 0-based values cause off-by-one errors (Iron Law 2).

character.description: 1-based character position within the line. LSP protocol is 1-based (Iron Law 2).
